select_gift_text: Select a gift or gifts you would like to give us in full, or contribute any amount to a larger item
no_physical_gifts: First off, please no physical gifts at the wedding! We have little space in our luggage, so we simply cannot bring back gifts - even small ones will add up. Besides, we have a lot of stuff in our small flat already :)
no_gift_required: Second, please feel no obligation to bring a gift at all - your presence at our wedding is the greatest gift to us! And many of you will have spent a good deal on your trip to Mexico, so please only give what you really want to, and what is suitable to your personal finances.
gifts_explain: Third, we have a few gifts we would like to receive from you. You can either select an item of the list to gift us in full, or contribute a portion to some of the larger items. You can also choose any sum to contribute to our wedding and future plans.
gifts_payment: After selecting, you have the possibility to transfer either to our shared PayPal account, Revolut bank account, or use the donation box at the wedding. Euros are preferred for cash, but any currency is fine.
mxn_invalid_amount: Please select a multiple of {{amount}} MXN
your_selection_fix: You have selected {{total_value}} ({{amount}} out of {{out_of}} items of {{value}})
